response.reasoning: Candidate has 14+ years of fullstack experience, well above the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq explicitly includes TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Prior Optilyz role used TypeScript, AWS CDK, React, and MongoDB — strong overlap with primary stack and database requirements. Java experience is present (Altom: robotic arms, mobile orchestration) but Kotlin is not mentioned. Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly listed, though the candidate has broad Node.js framework experience and testing expertise (TDD advocate, built test runners, Selenium courses, Fluent-Asserts library). Docker and Kubernetes appear in GISCollective. Strong testing/TDD culture aligns with code quality expectations. CS degree present. Overall a very strong match on primary stack and AI-agent angle, with minor gaps on Nest.js/Vitest/Kotlin specifics.
strengths: 14+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Active AI-agent and MCP framework work at current role — direct match for AI agent requirement
Deep TDD/testing background (built own test runner and assertion library, taught Selenium courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in primary stack
Vitest not mentioned (testing experience is in other frameworks/languages)
Kotlin not present; Java experience is older (2016–2018) and limited
response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar and has direct, current overlap with the primary stack plus the AI-agent requirement that is often hard to source. Framework-specific gaps (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin) are minor for a senior engineer with this breadth and a demonstrated record of picking the right tool per job. Strong interview signal.
